name: diff_board
short_description: Print a summary of the differences between the current board part and the given newer version of that board part.  Currently only differences in the pins of the board part and their properties are reported.
full_help:
diff_board

Description: 
Print a summary of the differences between the current board part and the given newer version of that board part.  Currently only differences in the pins of the board part and their properties are reported.

Syntax: 
diff_board  [-file <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <version>

Returns: 
new board version

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-file]     the output file
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <version>   the other board version to compare

Categories: 
Object, Board

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
